name: Herbed Pretzels
recipeInstructions: If using a bread maker, put all ingredients (except egg substitute and topping) into the machine, add spray oil for coating, and run on dough setting. If making by hand, mix dry ingredients in a bowl, then add water to form a well and combine. Knead until smooth and elastic. Cover and let rise until doubled (about 1 hour). Punch down and let rise again until doubled. Preheat oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. Divide dough into 12 pieces (or 8 for bread sticks). Shape the dough or leave as ropes. Coat with egg substitute and sprinkle with sesame seeds. For softer, browner pretzels, lightly spray the top with oil before baking. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes or until golden brown.
